title: Drive mechanism and medicament delivery device comprising the same
abstract: A drive mechanism (1) comprising: an activation rod (5) provided with external threads (5b) having a first thread helix angle, an activation knob (3) rotationally locked with the activation rod (5), wherein the knob (3) is configured to be moved between a first axial position relative to the rod (5) in which the knob (3) is prevented from rotation and a second axial position in which the knob (3) is allowed to rotate in a first direction, an axially slidable drum (9) which is rotationally locked, a dose drum (7) rotationally locked relative to the rod (5), wherein the dose drum (7) is configured to rotate relative to the slidable drum (9), an indicator drum (11) provided with external indicator drum threads (11a) having a second thread helix angle, wherein rotation of the knob (3) in the first direction causes concurrent first rotation of the rod (5) and the dose drum (7) in accordance with the first thread helix angle thereby axially displacing the activation knob (3), the rod (5), the dose drum (7) and the slidable drum (9) in a distal direction, wherein the slidabe drum (7) is configured to bring the indicator drum (11) with it causing second rotation of the indicator drum (11) in accordance with the second thread helix angle.
claims:
Claims 1. A drive mechanism (l) for a medicament delivery device (27), comprising: an activation rod (5) provided with external activation rod threads (5b) having a first thread helix angle (ai), an activation knob (3) rotationally locked with the activation rod (5), wherein the activation knob (3) is configured to be moved between a first axial position relative to the activation rod (5) in which the activation knob (3) is prevented from rotation and a second axial position in which the activation knob (3) is allowed to rotate in a first direction, an axially slidable drum (9) which is rotationally locked, a dose drum (7) rotationally locked relative to the activation rod (5), wherein the dose drum (7) is configured to rotate relative to the slidable drum (9), an indicator drum (11) provided with external indicator drum threads (11a) having a second thread helix angle (a2), wherein rotation of the activation knob (3) in the first direction causes concurrent first rotation of the activation rod (5) and the dose drum (7) in accordance with the first thread helix angle (at) thereby axially displacing the activation knob (3), the activation rod (5), the dose drum (7) and the slidable drum (9) in a distal direction, wherein the slidabe drum(7) is configured to bring the indicator drum (11) with it causing second rotation of the indicator drum (11) in accordance with the second thread helix angle (a2). 2. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the first thread helix angle (at) is larger than the second thread helix angle (a2). 3. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 1 or 2, comprising a remaining dosage ring (13) provided with inner ring threads (13a), wherein 

 i8 the dose drum (7) is provided with external dose drum threads (7b) configured to cooperate with the inner ring threads (13a), wherein the remaining dosage ring (13) is rotationally locked with the slidable drum (9) to prevent rotation of the remaining dosage ring (13) relative to the slidable drum (9), causing the remaining dosage ring (13) to move proximally along the external dose drum threads (7b) when the activation knob (3) is rotated in the first direction. 4. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, comprising a plunger rod (15), and an insert member (17) provided with a threaded insert member inner surface (17b), wherein the plunger rod (15) is configured to rotate only in the first direction, and wherein the insert member (17) is coupled in a rotationally locked manner with the plunger rod (15) and wherein the insert member (17) is configured to receive a proximal end portion of the activation rod (5), wherein the external activation rod threads (5b) are configured to cooperate with the threaded insert member inner surface (17b), causing the activation rod (5) and dose drum (7) to be axially displaced in the distal direction when the activation knob (3) is rotated in the first direction. 5. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 4, comprising a thread insert (21) provided with an threaded thread insert inner surface and configured to receive the plunger rod (15), wherein the plunger rod (15) has external plunger rod threads (15a) configured to cooperate with the threaded thread insert inner surface, and a ratchet member (19) configured to be rotationally locked with the plunger rod (15) and to be received by the thread insert (21) allowing rotation of the plunger rod (15) only in the first direction. 6. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 4, wherein pushing of the activation knob (3) when the activation knob (3) has been axially displaced by rotation of the activation knob (3) in the first direction causes the activation knob (3) to obtain the first axial position, whereby the activation rod (5) and the dose drum (7) are configured to move in the proximal direction without 

 rotation, causing the plunger rod (15) to rotate in the first direction and thereby move in the proximal direction through the thread insert (19). 7. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, comprising a ratchet ring (23) configured to engage with the slidable drum (9) to rotationally lock the ratchet ring (23) relative to the slidable drum (9), wherein the ratchet ring (23) is configured to engage with the activation knob (3) in the first axial position to thereby prevent rotation of the activation knob (3) and to disengage from the activation knob (3) in the second axial position. 8. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 7, wherein the activation knob (3) has an inner surface facing (3c) the activation rod (5), wherein the inner surface (3c) is provided with a first axial protrusion (3d) and the ratchet ring (23) is provided with first teeth (23c) configured to engage with the first axial protrusion (3d) to prevent rotation of the activation knob (3) in the first axial position. 9. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 8, wherein the ratchet ring (23) has a distal edge (23b) and the first teeth (23d) are distributed along the distal edge (23b). 10. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in claim 8 or 9, wherein the activation knob (3) and the ratchet ring (23) are configured to engage with a snap-fit in the first axial position to maintain the activation knob (3) in the first axial position. 11. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in any of claims 7 to 10, wherein the activation knob (3) is provided with second teeth (3f) along its inner perimeter surface and the ratchet ring (23) comprises arms (23a) configured to engage with the second teeth (3f) to provide audible clicks when the activation knob (3) is rotated in the first direction. 12. The drive mechanism (l) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the indicator drum (n) has an external surface provided with a dosage scale. 13. The drive mechanism (1) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, comprising a housing (29) configured to receive the activation rod (3), dose drum (7), the slidable drum (9) and the indicator drum (11), wherein the housing (29) has an inner surface provided with inner housing threads configured to cooperate with the external indicator drum threads (11a) and wherein the slidable drum (9) is rotationally locked with the housing (29). 14. A medicament delivery device (27) comprising: a housing (29), and a drive mechanism (1) as claimed in any of claims 1-11 arranged in the housing (29). 15. The medicament delivery device (27) as claimed in claim 14, wherein the slidable drum (9) is rotationally locked with the housing (29). 16. The medicament delivery device (27) as claimed in claim 14 or 15, wherein the housing (29) has an inner surface provided with inner housing threads configured to cooperate with the external indicator drum threads (11a).
